verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come to Sunday School Come to Sunday School We shall come rejoicing Come to Sunday School.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Bring your Bibles, too Bring your Bibles, too We shall come rejoicing Bring your Bibles, too.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Bring some friends with you And your loved ones, too We shall come rejoicing Come to Sunday School.
